messages.text: Are you coming back for dinner this Sunday? Aunty Susan is coming too.
Yes mum, I'll be back by 6.
Good. Don't forget it's grandma's birthday next weekend, we're doing a small family celebration.
I won't forget. I'll get the cake on the way.
Reminder: grandma's birthday dinner this Sunday 7pm at the usual zi char place.
Noted! See you all there.
I paid for the gift already, transfer me later.
Wah did you all see the photo uncle sent? So funny.
Eh got match this Saturday or not?
Confirm got. 4pm at the usual pitch.
Steady. I'll chope the court. Who's bringing the bibs?
Don't be late this time ah.
Hi, I saw your tuition centre on Facebook. Do you offer a trial class for Primary 5 maths?
Hi Mrs Tan! Yes we do — the first trial class is free.
That's great. How much per session after the trial?
It's $60 per session, and we have a package price if you sign up for 8 sessions.
Okay can. Is there a Saturday morning slot available for my son?
Bro you free for dinner this Friday?
Can! Usual place at 7?
Steady. Eh by the way, my boss wants a new landing page for our product launch. Can you quote me for a landing page?
Timeline is quite tight, when can you finish the first draft?
First draft by next Wednesday should be doable. I'll send you a proper quote tonight.
Also can you send me the invoice for the last job? Finance is chasing me.
Dinner still on for Friday right?
Hey all, my colleague is looking for a designer to do a brand refresh for her bakery. Budget around $2k.
She needs it done within 6 weeks. Can I pass her your contact?
Sure, sounds good. Send her my number, thanks ah!
Done! She says she'll WhatsApp you this week.
Hi, I got your number from a friend. Are you available for logo design?
What's your rate for a simple logo?
